{{Infobox character
| name = Blood Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage of Red Faith, mad tool of a Dreadgod, crazed researcher of forbidden knowledge, ghost child
| abilities = sacred arts, Forged claw, teleportation anchor, voice can be transmitted through aura, void space, blood techniques
| affiliations = Redmoon's organization
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Blood Sage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Blood [[Sage]] is a powerful individual and the founder of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] cult. Physically, he is described as a skeletal, thin man with extremely pale skin and long white hair that reaches his feet. A distinctive feature of his appearance is the red markings trailing from his eyes, giving him a constant appearance of weeping blood. He often maintains a hunched or crouched posture. The Blood [[Sage]] is an expert in [[blood madra]] and [[aura]], possessing the ability to manipulate blood techniques and command [[Blood Shadows]]. He has a history of training others, specifically claiming [[Yerin Arelius]] as his disciple because she utilizes a technique he developed for her [[Blood Shadow]]. He is also capable of using specialized items, such as violet elixirs or a cauldron powered by his own energy, to aid in combat. His influence extends through the creation of bloodspawn—red puppets made from [[blood madra]]—and his connection to the [[Sage of Red Faith]], who provided him with a [[Divine Treasure]]. Even after death, his presence persists through a [[Remnant]] that resembles a crimson skeleton with floating eyes. In terms of temperament, he is portrayed as unpredictable and occasionally frustrating, yet he can be a valuable ally when his interests align with others. He possesses significant mobility, capable of leaping great distances and appearing almost instantly via spatial anchors.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blood Sage]] is a character who has spoken of [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A figure resembling a skeleton covered in skin, the Blood [[Sage]] once faced being driven off by [[Min Shuei]]. After claiming the right to train [[Yerin Arelius]] and calling [[Yan Shoumei]] away, the entity attended the tournament where [[Yerin]] suspected they were responsible for preventing her [[Shadow]] from hollowing her out. While crouching at the feet of the [[Monarch]], the Blood [[Sage]] expressed interest in examining [[Yerin]] and the potential for her to combine with [[Ruby]] at [[Archlord]]. During a teleportation where many people were carried, the Blood [[Sage]] ordered the children upstairs and commanded Arelius to move. Using a [[Forged claw]], the entity slashed through [[Eithan]]'s [[Hollow Armor]] and stood opposite a bleeding [[Eithan]] to question his identity before running off.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] claims the right to train [[Yerin Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] is a character who was once driven off by [[Min Shuei]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was called away by the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] attended the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] assumes the [[Blood Sage]] is involved in how her [[Shadow]] is kept from hollowing her out.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] is a character.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] was crouching at the feet of the [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] was interested in [[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] combining at [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] is interested in examining [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] is a character who chews on his thumb.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] carried many people during the teleportation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] ordered the children upstairs and told Arelius to move.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] uses a [[Forged claw]] to slash through [[Eithan]]'s [[Hollow Armor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] resembles a skeleton with skin.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] was standing opposite a bleeding [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] questioned [[Eithan]]'s identity.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] had run off.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Blood [[Sage]], the [[Sage of Red Faith]], was summoned through a spatial anchor by [[Seishen Daji]]. This tall, skeletal figure is characterized by knee-length white hair and red lines trailing from his eyes like bloody tears. He asserts that he belongs to a revolution within the [[sacred arts]] intended to surpass Emriss. Having previously engaged in combat with [[Eithan]], the [[Sage]] later utilized a teleportation anchor to transport [[Overlords]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Blood Sage]] was summoned by [[Seishen Daji]] using a spatial anchor.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Blood Sage]] is the [[Sage of Red Faith]] and appears as a tall, skeletal man with white hair down to his knees and red lines from his eyes that look like bloody tears.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Blood Sage]] claims to be part of a revolution in the [[sacred arts]] that will surpass Emriss.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] had previously fought the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Blood Sage]] used a teleportation anchor to transport [[Overlords]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Sage]]'s voice can be transmitted through [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Sage]] is one of the cult leaders who arrived.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Blood [[Sage]] is a man with long white hair, a skeletal face, and scarlet lines running from his eyes. Once known as the ghost child and a crazed researcher of forbidden knowledge, he was formerly regarded as the mad tool of a [[Dreadgod]]. During his encounters, he utilizes blood techniques and a syringe containing a shining violet elixir, while also possessing a void space. He holds the opinion that [[Redmoon]]'s organization is only considered a cult because of its leader, suggesting it would be a research society under his leadership. After slinking past [[Yerin]] and [[Little Blue]], he is believed to be mortally injured.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] must show her face to the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] is a man who [[Eithan]] and [[Dross]] have told [[Lindon]] about.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] has long white hair and scarlet lines running down from his eyes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] is a researcher who was once called the mad tool of a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] was previously called a crazed researcher of forbidden knowledge.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] was previously called 'ghost child.'<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] believes [[Redmoon]]'s organization is known as a cult because of [[Redmoon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] claims that if he were in charge, the organization would be known as a research society.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] possesses a void space.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] uses a syringe filled with a shining violet elixir.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] is a character with a skeletal face.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] has a twin.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] slunk past [[Yerin]] and [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] has white hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] is believed to be mortally injured.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] uses blood techniques.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blood Sage]] is a source of information mentioned by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Blood Sage]] scuttled off.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Children, go upstairs. Arelius, you move.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Blood Sage looked up. “This isn’t you. Who is this?”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Still have to show my face to the Blood Sage, and now I won’t have to pretend to be sorry for cutting their friends into chunks.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
